Hearing Re: Specially Appearing Defendants Brian Heits And Heit Law Group's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint And To Dismiss Complaint.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar per Notice of Withdrawal filed December 7, 2021.
